products.name: James Comey indicted over Instagram seashell photo that allegedly threatened Trump

products.name: Taylor Swift is stepping up the legal war on AI copycats
products.summary: Taylor Swift has been at the center of AI imitation controversies for years, and now, she's become the latest celebrity who's escalating attempts to protect herself from AI copycats. As usual, however, the legal system intersects with technology in complicated

products.name: Now YouTube TV lets you multiview any channel you want

products.name: The FCC is going after the broadcast licenses of Disney-owned ABC stations

products.name: Live updates from Elon Musk and Sam Altman’s court battle over the future of OpenAI
products.summary: Sam Altman and Elon Musk are facing off in a high-stakes trial that could alter the future of OpenAI and its most well-known product, ChatGPT. In 2024, Musk filed a lawsuit accusing OpenAI of abandoning its founding mission of developing AI to benefit humanity

products.name: Elon Musk takes the stand in high-profile trial against OpenAI
products.summary: Elon Musk officially began his testimony in the trial he has brought against OpenAI CEO Sam Altman and company president Greg Brockman. The three were on the initial founding team of OpenAI, with Musk investing up to $38 million early on before the co-founders

products.name: You can get dragged into a police investigation by proximity alone — for now

products.name: Google Home makes it easier to understand why devices aren’t working

products.name: The Nex Playground gaming console is $60 off this week
products.summary: One of the best-selling gaming consoles over the winter holidays was the Nex Playground, a small camera-equipped cube that runs motion-controlled games made primarily for kids. It got a $50 price increase this month — going from $249 to $299 — but shoppers are

products.name: Amazon is already offering new OpenAI products on AWS
products.summary: A day after OpenAI got Microsoft to agree to end exclusive rights, AWS announced a slate of OpenAI model offerings, including a new agent service.

products.name: Amazon launches an AI-powered audio Q&A experience on product pages
products.summary: Amazon's new "Join the chat" feature lets you ask questions about products and receive AI-powered audio responses.
